seed_instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days.
org_constraint: The email must include at least two reasons for requesting the extension.
new_constraint: Do not include any reasons for requesting the extension.
instruction: Write a email to your professor to ask for an extention on a project due in two days. The email must include at least two reasons for requesting the extension. Do not include any reasons for requesting the extension.
response:
Subject: Extension Request: [Project Name] - [Your Name]

Dear Professor [Professor's Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to respectfully request a short extension on the [Project Name], which is currently due in two days. Unfortunately, I am facing some unexpected challenges that are preventing me from submitting a work of the quality you expect.

First, I encountered significant technical difficulties with the software required for the project's data analysis, which has delayed my progress considerably more than anticipated. Second, I have been dealing with an unforeseen personal emergency that has required my immediate attention, making it difficult to dedicate the focused time needed to finalize the project.

I am committed to completing this assignment to the best of my ability and would greatly appreciate the opportunity to submit it by [New Date/Time]. Please let me know if this is possible or if there are any alternative arrangements you would recommend.

Thank you for your time and understanding.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Student ID Number]
[Course Name/Number]
